# Command safety

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_agent_assets.py; edit agent-command-policy.toml. -->

Apply the highest matching authorization tier. `sensitive-output` is an independent guard. If a command or flag combination is absent, stop and inspect `hpc-compose --offline docs command safety` plus the installed binary's help.

## 1. `automatic-read-only`

May run automatically when its independent sensitive-output guard is also satisfied.

`cache`, `cache inspect`, `cache list`, `checkpoints`, `completions`, `config`, `context`, `debug`, `diff`, `docs`, `doctor`, `doctor fabric-smoke`, `doctor mpi-smoke`, `doctor readiness`, `examples`, `examples coverage`, `examples list`, `examples recommend`, `examples search`, `experiment`, `experiment show`, `explain`, `feedback`, `inspect`, `jobs`, `jobs list`, `lint`, `logs`, `lsp`, `plan`, `preflight`, `ps`, `pull`, `reach`, `render`, `rendezvous`, `rendezvous list`, `rendezvous resolve`, `replay`, `schema`, `score`, `stats`, `status`, `sweep`, `sweep list`, `sweep results`, `sweep status`, `validate`, `watch`, `weather`, `workspace`.

## 2. `scoped-local-mutation`

Requires authorization for the named local write scope.

`artifacts`, `doctor cluster-report`, `evolve`, `experiment bundle`, `experiment note`, `experiment tag`, `new`, `notebook promote`, `setup`, `sweep observe`, `workspace status`.

## 3. `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation`

Requires explicit authorization before executing workload code or changing an external non-scheduler resource.

`dev`, `prepare`, `rendezvous register`, `test`, `tmux`, `workspace allocate`, `workspace extend`.

## 4. `explicit-quota`

Requires explicit authorization for scheduler submission, allocation, or quota consumption.

`alloc`, `germinate`, `notebook`, `run`, `shell`, `sweep submit`, `up`, `when`.

## 5. `explicit-destructive`

Requires explicit authorization for deletion, cancellation, requeue, or other destructive mutation.

`cache prune`, `cancel`, `clean`, `down`, `rendezvous prune`, `sweep stop`, `workspace release`.

## Complete flag overrides

Apply every matching row in policy order. An unchanged tier does not remove an independent sensitive-output guard.

| Scope | Flags | Resulting tier | Effect changes | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Global | `--offline` | unchanged | removes `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | The CLI rejects SSH, network-backed delegation, scheduler contact, submissions, allocations, and cancels before invoking external tools. Local mutation and sensitive-output guards still apply. |
| Global | `--verbose` | unchanged | adds `sensitive-output` | Verbose diagnostics may reveal resolved paths, runtime details, or command material. |
| Global | `--debug` | unchanged | adds `sensitive-output` | Debug diagnostics may reveal resolved paths, runtime details, or command material. |
| `clean` | `--dry-run` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write`, `local-delete` | Preview the cleanup plan without deleting files. |
| `config` | `--show-values` | unchanged | adds `sensitive-output` | Disables redaction of sensitive-looking values. Agents must not use or ingest this output. |
| `context` | `--show-values` | unchanged | adds `sensitive-output` | Disables redaction of sensitive-looking interpolation values. Agents must not use or ingest this output. |
| `doctor fabric-smoke` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered probe script to the requested path. |
| `doctor fabric-smoke` | `--submit` | `explicit-quota` | adds `local-write`, `executes-user-code`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `polls` | Submits and waits for the fabric probe. |
| `doctor mpi-smoke` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered probe script to the requested path. |
| `doctor mpi-smoke` | `--submit` | `explicit-quota` | adds `local-write`, `executes-user-code`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `polls` | Submits and waits for the MPI probe. |
| `doctor readiness` | `--run` | `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation` | adds `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh` | Runs the spec-defined readiness probe from the current host. |
| `evolve` | `--list-lessons` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write` | Lists built-in lessons without writing a spec. |
| `evolve` | `--describe-lesson` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write` | Describes one built-in lesson without writing a spec. |
| `germinate` | `--dry-run` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `sensitive-output`; removes `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Skips preparation and submission but writes an owner-only canary script to the explicit or default path. |
| `germinate` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered canary script to the requested path. |
| `inspect` | `--rightsize` | unchanged | adds `scheduler-read` | Reads tracked post-run metrics and scheduler accounting for right-sizing. |
| `lint` | `--fix` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Applies auto-fixable findings to the spec. |
| `lint` | `--dry-run` | `automatic-read-only` | adds `sensitive-output`; removes `local-write` | With --fix, prints a proposed diff without writing. |
| `logs` | `--follow` | unchanged | adds `polls` | Continues reading appended log data until interrupted. |
| `logs` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates the read over SSH. |
| `new` | `--list-templates` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write` | Lists built-in templates without writing a spec. |
| `new` | `--describe-template` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write` | Describes one built-in template without writing a spec. |
| `notebook` | `--dry-run` | `scoped-local-mutation` | removes `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Skips preparation and submission but writes an owner-only notebook script to the explicit or default path. |
| `notebook` | `--local` | `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation` | removes `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel` | Runs the interactive service through the local supervisor instead of Slurm. |
| `notebook` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered script to the requested path. |
| `plan` | `--show-script` | unchanged | adds `sensitive-output` | Prints the generated script, which can contain commands, paths, and expanded values. Prefer explain; do not ingest unredacted script output. |
| `preflight` | `--fs-probes` | `explicit-quota` | adds `local-write`, `executes-user-code`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Submits a tiny Slurm job to probe shared filesystem behavior. |
| `ps` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates the read over SSH. |
| `pull` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates command resolution over SSH. |
| `reach` | `--open` | `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation` | adds `network-or-ssh`, `polls` | Opens the SSH tunnel in the foreground. |
| `render` | `--output` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the generated script to the requested path. The caller must request an owner-only destination and must not read it back into the conversation. |
| `run` | `--local` | `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation` | removes `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel` | Runs workload code through the local launcher instead of Slurm. |
| `run` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered script to the requested path. |
| `score` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates the read over SSH. |
| `stats` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates the read over SSH. |
| `status` | `--remote` | unchanged | adds `network-or-ssh` | Delegates the read over SSH. |
| `sweep observe` | `--watch` + `--stop-when` | `explicit-destructive` | adds `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Polls until a condition matches and then cancels remaining trials. |
| `sweep submit` | `--dry-run` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write`, `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Validates and prints expanded trials without writing scripts or submitting jobs. |
| `test` | `--submit` | `explicit-quota` | adds `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit` | Submits the finite smoke test to Slurm. |
| `test` | `--preemption` | `explicit-destructive` | adds `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel` | Submits, signals, requeues, and observes a synthetic preemption drill. |
| `up` | `--dry-run` | `scoped-local-mutation` | removes `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Skips preparation and submission but writes an owner-only launcher script to the explicit or default path. |
| `up` | `--resume-diff-only` | `automatic-read-only` | removes `local-write`, `executes-user-code`, `network-or-ssh`, `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel`, `polls` | Prints only the resume-sensitive diff and exits. |
| `up` | `--local` | `explicit-runtime-or-external-mutation` | removes `scheduler-read`, `scheduler-submit`, `scheduler-cancel` | Runs workload code through the local launcher instead of Slurm. |
| `up` | `--script-out` | `scoped-local-mutation` | adds `local-write` | Writes the rendered script to the requested path. |

## Sensitive-output rule

Do not echo or ingest unredacted scripts, values, logs, or debug output. Prefer `hpc-compose --offline plan --format json` and `hpc-compose --offline explain --format json`. If the user explicitly asks for a script file, write it owner-only and do not read it back.
